governed_case_coverage.earnings_cutoff: AAPL earnings availability vs registered ET close via zoneinfo (real)
governed_case_coverage.earnings_evidence_missing: AAPL earnings evidence unavailable by close t at some sessions -> INELIGIBLE:ELIGIBILITY_EVIDENCE_MISSING (real)
governed_case_coverage.identity_refusal: synthetic sentinel: injected missing SPY factor obs -> SIGNAL_INPUT_IDENTITY_MISMATCH (searched: SPY is complete over dev -> 0 natural factor-missing)
governed_case_coverage.integrity_stop: synthetic sentinel: injected unexplained interior hole -> OLS_WINDOW_INCOMPLETE (searched real dev slice: 0 natural interior holes among the selected securities)
governed_case_coverage.known_halt_absence: SEARCHED: no governed halt/absence marker in the dev slice -> 0 real cases; not fabricated (Sharadar SEP has no halt evidence field)
governed_case_coverage.missing_pit_sector: sentinel (cutoff before any accepted SIC) -> SECTOR_PIT_IDENTITY_MISSING; SEARCHED: a cleanly-resolving no-SIC ticker also has ambiguous lineage in this slice
governed_case_coverage.per_session_cik_transition: TRV (crosswalk cik 831001 eff 1986-1998, 86312 eff 2007-); resolve_cik_at -> 86312 in dev, predecessor interval excluded (real; unit-tested)
governed_case_coverage.same_timestamp_sector_conflict: SEARCHED: sic_conflicts table empty over dev -> 0 real cases; conflict path qualified by the closed resolver + a synthetic construction only
governed_case_coverage.security_identity_ambiguous: TRV + FRCB: the closed identity_adapter lineage (which does not read effective_through) sees 2 pre-window permatickers -> INTEGRITY_STOP:SECURITY_IDENTITY_AMBIGUOUS (real, per-session)
governed_case_coverage.warm_up_insufficient: all securities at early/IPO sessions -> INELIGIBLE:OLS_WINDOW_INSUFFICIENT (real)

note: universe count is a constant top-250/month; high==low==250 (recorded, not a selector). Cases with 0 real dev instances disclose the searched population + rule; synthetic sentinels are supplementary evidence only, never a substitute for real emitted/ineligible shard evidence.

AAPL.reason: ordinary continuously-traded; PIT sector + earnings coverage (earnings-cutoff case)

TRV.reason: multi-CIK crosswalk (831001 eff 1986-1998, 86312 eff 2007-); PIT CIK resolves to 86312 in dev -> per-session CIK case (predecessor interval correctly excluded)

TWLO.reason: IPO within development window (first price 2016-06) -> exact warm-up boundary

selection_basis: mechanical structural coverage; frozen before any signal inspection
